description_long: This sports car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a deep navy blue base color accented by bold white racing stripes and dynamic flame decals along the sides. The front end is aggressive, with dark-tinted headlights and a low, wide grille, while the windshield and windows are tinted gold, adding a striking contrast. The roof and rear window are also tinted, and the rear features dual exhausts and stylized taillights. The car sits on dark alloy wheels with a five-spoke design, and the side profile reveals sculpted lines and a low stance typical of high-performance vehicles. The interior is not visible, but the exterior suggests a lightweight, performance-oriented build, likely using a mix of metal, plastic, and glass. The overall design is sporty and eye-catching, suitable for urban streets or racing scenarios.
description: A navy blue sports car with white racing stripes, flame decals, gold-tinted windows, and five-spoke alloy wheels. Its low, aerodynamic profile and bold graphics make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive grille, dark headlights, white racing stripes, and gold-tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flame decal, gold-tinted side windows, five-spoke wheels, and sculpted body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhausts, stylized taillights, rear window tint, and continuation of the white stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with flame decal, gold-tinted windows, and five-spoke wheels visible.
